name: Pan Stickers with Minced Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the plain flour and cold water until smooth.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Once hot, drop spoonfuls of batter into the pan.
5. Cook until golden brown on both sides.
6. Remove from pan and drain on paper towels.
7. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
